song.title: No Scar
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Hast thou no scar? No hidden scar on foot, or side, or hand? I hear thee sung throughout the land, I hear them hail thy shining star, Hast thou no scar? no scar?
[V2] 2) Hast thou no wound? Yet I was wounded by the archers, spent, Leaned Me against a tree; and rent By rav’ning beasts ’round me, I swooned: Hast thou no wound? no wound?
[V3] 3) No wound? no scar? Yet, as the Master shall the servant be, And pierced the feet that follow Me; But whole? can he have followed far Who has no wound nor scar?
song.author: Mountain Breezes
